query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "agent explorative policy optimization for multimodal agentic reasoning" linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it investigates the same core mechanism (enhancing LLM reasoning capabilities via fine-tuning and alignment) and measures the same dependent variable (reasoning performance on benchmarks) that the user's question targets, even though it proposes a specific "Alignment Fine-Tuning" method rather than the "Agent Explorative Policy Optimization" mentioned in the user's title. It provides the necessary canonical prior work on the "reasoning" and "alignment
